text.title: Caching Architecture Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the caching-architecture methodology end-to-end.

step.name: profile-endpoints
step.action: Pull per-endpoint RPS + p95 latency from last 30d.
step.decision-gate: If no endpoint exceeds SLO, recommend skip.

step.name: classify-data
step.action: Group by data class with shared freshness/SLO/invalidation profile.

step.name: pick-pattern
step.action: Choose: cache-aside / read-through / write-through / write-behind / write-around / no-cache.
step.decision-gate: If pattern is write-behind without idempotency support, block.

step.name: define-invalidation
step.action: Define invalidation per class: TTL-only, on-write, or hybrid; document the publishers.

step.name: load-test
step.action: Run a 5x-load test with cache cold start and cache full; verify p95 ≤ SLO and no thundering herd.
step.decision-gate: If thundering herd observed, return to step 3 and add single-flight.
